attr.title: JS Game Launcher
attr.desc: A compatibility layer for JavaScript games to run without a browser using standard web APIs. Supports Canvas 2D, WebGL, WebAudio, Gamepad API, and more. Run browser-targeted JS games on retro handhelds.
attr.inst: Place .jsg game folders in roms/jsgames/. Each game needs a game.js (or main.js/index.js) and a .jsg file.
